mapper.select: select * from faq order by display_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq ( faq_id, category, question, answer, display_order, created_at ) VALUES ( FAQ_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{category}, #{question}, #{answer}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(display_order), 0) + 1 FROM faq), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE faq SET display_order = display_order - 1 WHERE display_order > #{display_order}
